description:
**Milestone:** Health Dashboard and Failure Alerting

In SchedulerService, emit a scheduler:task-failed event (with taskId, taskName, error message, timestamp ISO string) when a task handler throws during execution. Add a WebSocket broadcast handler in the server event pipeline to forward scheduler:task-failed events to all connected UI clients. In automations-section.tsx subscribe to this event via the existing WebSocket hook and show a toast notification using the existing toast system when a maintenance task fails. Route the event to Discord #infra channel (ID 1469109809939742814) when DISCORD_TOKEN is configured — use existing DiscordBot service pattern, non-fatal if Discord unavailable.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/scheduler-service.ts
- apps/server/src/server/websockets.ts
- apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/automations/automations-section.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] scheduler:task-failed event emitted from SchedulerService on task throw with taskId, taskName, error, timestamp
- [ ] WebSocket delivers the event to all connected clients
- [ ] UI shows toast notification within 60s of task failure
- [ ] Discord notification sent to #infra when DISCORD_TOKEN is set (non-fatal if unavailable)
- [ ] Existing task execution is not disrupted — failures are caught and logged before event emission
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean

**Complexity:** small

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
